title: Add a shadcn login form to /login
context: Resolve the app root from JOURNAL.md (recorded by 001-scaffold-nextjs). The Card and Button shadcn components already exist from earlier tasks; reuse them rather than restyling from scratch.
goal: A /login route renders an accessible email + password form built from shadcn components, with client-side required-field validation, and the page builds and serves without errors.
acceptance: src/app/login/page.tsx exists and imports Card and Button from @/components/ui.
The form has labelled email and password inputs and a submit button; submitting with an empty field shows a validation message and does not navigate.
Run `bun run build` from the app root — exits 0.

Start the dev server on port 3000, then via mcp__claude-in-chrome__ open http://localhost:3000/login, confirm the form renders and empty-submit validation fires, and capture a screenshot. Stop the server after.
tests: Add a component test asserting the login form renders both inputs and the submit button.
Add a test asserting that submitting with an empty email surfaces a validation error.
